title: InferenceConfig
description: Inference hyperparameter snapshot captured alongside an evaluation for reproducibility.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature (0–2). Null means the server default was used.

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling probability (0–1). Null means the server default was used.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of output tokens. Null means no override.

quantization_level.description: Model quantization level (e.g. 'int4', 'int8', 'fp16'). Null means unknown or not applicable.
